title: session.go lifecycleLoop child exit: defer unlock
description:
File: internal/session/session.go, lines 650-657

lifecycleLoop() locks the VT mutex when the child process exits to set ChildExited/ExitError and re-render all clients. The unlock is manual at line 657.

This runs inline in RunDaemon/RunInteractive (not a goroutine). No recover. A panic would crash the daemon process.

Current risk: If ForEachClient/RenderScreen/RenderBar panics, the daemon crashes with a locked mutex. Crashing is acceptable for lifecycle failure, but defer unlock is needed for consistency and to prevent deadlock if a recover is added upstream later.

Fix:
1. Convert manual vt.Mu.Unlock() to defer-based unlock (wrap in anonymous func).
2. No recover needed — inline lifecycle code, crashing is appropriate.
